proposal.working_title: AI Labs Explained: The 90-Day Discover-to-Deploy Path That Replaces an 18-Month Internal Build
proposal.one_line_angle: DFY AI implementation is not outsourcing. It is a structured Discover, Design, Deploy, Maintain pipeline that compresses what mid-market companies typically spend 18 months building internally into a 90-day production system, without the engineering-headcount tax.
outline_bullets: The Three Hidden Costs of Building AI In-House That Quadruple After Month 9
Inside the Discover, Design, Deploy, Maintain Workflow: A 90-Day Walkthrough
Five Operational Triggers That Mean You Should Hire an AI Lab Instead of Hiring Engineers
